title: arabis alpina subsp. alpina
intro: Arabis alpina subsp. alpina, also known as the alpine rockcress, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Arabis alpina subsp. alpina include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Arabis alpina subsp. alpina can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
